goal: Expose the Spring PetClinic legacy app as an MCP Server via a Quarkus sidecar, without modifying the original codebase.

steps.description: Create MicroProfile REST Client interface for PetClinic read-only pets endpoints
Create Quarkus MCP Server class exposing pets REST operations as MCP tools
Update Kubernetes manifest to add petclinic-mcp sidecar container to the existing Deployment

constraints: Do not modify pom.xml — required dependencies already present
Only implement GET (read) operations for /pets and /pets/{petId}
MCP server must listen on port 8888 with CORS enabled
